Winamp classic skins — skinnable player aesthetic

Clawmachine-fit: A. Paradigm reference for theme engine: same functional shell, radically different skins. 'Really whips the llama's ass' — operator personality, not flat corporate.

Credits: Webamp Skin Museum (skins.webamp.org / Jordan Eldredge), Internet Archive winamp collection, Winamp Heritage.. Internal non-commercial fair-use research reference. Do not redistribute.
